title: taraxacum acrifolium
intro: Taraxacum acrifolium, also known as the crested dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion genus, characterized by its distinctive crested or hairy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum acrifolium include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
